title: Adds tunnel routes for system reset.
body:
Adds tunnel route for system reset.
Adds relevant test cases and swagger docs.

Signed-off-by: Sujil02 <sushah@redhat.com>

comments.body: Some kind of test issue going on that the system won't let me look at atm.
:umbrella: The latest upstream changes (presumably #6148) made this pull request unmergeable. Please resolve the merge conflicts.
